caption:
Join us at our Copenhagen store tomorrow, March 26th, from 5–8pm to celebrate the collaboration between @frejawewer & @flatlisteyewear - The capsule is available in-store & online from 4pm at Stoy.

We are serving pink sangrias, churros & beers.

Hope to see you there, Landemærket 8 <3

alt: Photo by ♡ 𝔧𝔢𝔰𝔰𝔦𝔠𝔞 𝔞𝔫𝔞𝔰𝔱𝔞𝔰𝔦𝔞 on July 04, 2025.

caption: Accidentally planned a round trip road trip (during a massive heatwave) to Dallas to visit my family which I haven’t seen in over 2yrs. It was up to 120 in some places, went through thunderstorms+fires, had an exhaust system issue (resolved itself; must’ve been bad gasoline), sat in horrible traffic in the desert but I’m back home in Laguna ready to decompress from the road.  Ending the collection of photos with my favorite video of the year so far. Hope you all are well! Xo
firstComment: One day, we’re gonna have a real hang out and it’s gonna blow our minds. Hope you had a nice time despite the aforementioned hiccups. Maybe you even had a break from the outrageous temps while you were in Texas! (That’s so wild to say.) 💕

latestComments.text: One day, we’re gonna have a real hang out and it’s gonna blow our minds. Hope you had a nice time despite the aforementioned hiccups. Maybe you even had a break from the outrageous temps while you were in Texas! (That’s so wild to say.) 💕

replies.text: @dr.stevegoldberg it was like walking directly into fire as soon as I got in or out of the car. 🥵🥵🥵

latestComments.text: I miss thunderstorms!! Must have been intense with that heat. Welcome back tho! ❤️

replies.text: @thunderesque I almost pulled over to let it pass, it was that intense.

latestComments.text: @toothsweater I was thinking while I was there that it wasn’t THAT bad for being mid summer. I definitely remember it being much hotter the last time I was visiting.
